description: Button that sets input values first, then replays commands. Combines setvalue operations with playaction. All setvalue operations execute before commands are replayed.
utility: Create a button that sets values then replays commands

arguments.name: setvalues
arguments.description: One or more setvalue() expressions to execute before replay

arguments.name: commandVars
arguments.description: One or more variable references to existing commands to replay

alternates.syntax: playinputaction(at(3, 4), setvalue(n1, 10), setvalue(n2, 20), A, B, display("Go"))
alternates.description: Set two values then replay two commands

alternates.syntax: playinputaction(at(4, 6), setvalue(n1, 10), setvalue(n2, 20), A, B, C, type(sequence), display("Play"), fs(26))
alternates.description: Set values, replay commands sequentially with font size

examples.scenario: HCF tree method with input numbers and factor bars
examples.expression:
number_1 = inputnumber(at(5.1, 16.8), "a", value(20), size(4), display("A"))
number_2 = inputnumber(at(5.1, 26), "b", value(125), size(4), display("B"))
primefactor_1 = primefactor(at(8.4, 17.8), view(12.4, 11), a)
primefactor_2 = primefactor(at(8.3, 31.1), view(12.2, 10.9), b)
lcmbar_1 = hcfbar(at(21.9, 23.8), view(5.4, 12.5), primefactor_1, primefactor_2, t(10))
playinputaction(at(4, 6), setvalue(number_1, 10), setvalue(number_2, 20), primefactor_1, primefactor_2, lcmbar_1, type(sequence), display("Play"), fs(26))
playinputaction(at(3, 4), setvalue(n1, 10), setvalue(n2, 20), A, B, display("Go"), type(sequence))
